title: Zed + Gemma-4 12B & Qwen-3.6: HOW IS THIS POSSIBLE?! THIS IS CRAZY!
summary: Zed code editor now integrates local AI models via LM Studio, Ollama, and llama.cpp, enabling on-device coding assistance without cloud reliance. The integration supports models like Gemma-4 12B and Qwen-3.6 for tasks including code explanation, refactoring, and boilerplate generation.
